classification_rationale: The exploit targets the share-asset-pricing mechanism of Yearn v1 yDAI vault, which reads the Curve 3pool spot price to compute share NAV. By repeatedly imbalancing the 3pool with flash-loan-funded swaps, the attacker forces the vault to deposit and withdraw at systematically disadvantageous share-to-asset ratios, extracting value through rounding accumulated across 11 transactions. The accounting-window between vault deposit and the 3pool price restoration is the mechanism-level vulnerability.
